summary: Completed second iteration testing of CloseLoop B2B SaaS application after fixes. Backend APIs remain fully functional (15/15 tests passed). Critical authentication persistence issue persists, preventing full testing of core features including the Call Review page (THE HERO feature).

ui_bugs.issue: Signup form fields (name, email, password, company) not loading or visible on signup page
Demo request form not loading properly - 'Request a Demo' text not found

integration_issues.issue: CRITICAL: Users get logged out when navigating between pages. Authentication session does not persist across page navigation, preventing access to protected routes
Cannot test THE HERO FEATURE (Call Review page) due to authentication persistence issues. Users lose session before reaching call details

passed_tests: API health check and connectivity (15/15 backend endpoints)
Landing page loads with clean design and messaging
Pricing page displays 3 tiers correctly (Starter, Professional, Enterprise)
Login form accepts credentials and authenticates successfully
Dashboard loads initially after login with welcome message
User profile information shows in sidebar
CTA buttons and marketing copy display
Backend authentication, calls CRUD, vault operations, admin operations

success_percentage.frontend: 40% (public pages work, auth works initially, but session persistence fails)

critical_priority: FIX AUTHENTICATION PERSISTENCE: Users lose session when navigating between pages. This is blocking all protected route testing including the Call Review page (THE HERO feature)
Investigate AuthContext token management and localStorage persistence in /app/frontend/src/context/AuthContext.js
Ensure JWT tokens are properly stored and retrieved across page navigation
high_priority: Fix signup form - form fields not rendering properly on /signup page
Once auth persistence is fixed, thoroughly test Call Review page (THE HERO) with split screen layout, transcript, AI outputs, and approval workflow
medium_priority: Fix demo request form loading issues on /demo page
Test admin features (Data Vault, Team management) after auth fix
Test call creation and AI processing workflow
action_item_for_main_agent.notes: Backend is rock solid with 100% API functionality. The main blocker is frontend authentication state management. Once fixed, all core features should be testable. The Call Review page implementation looks comprehensive based on code review but cannot be tested due to auth issues.
